programme.desc: Hollister stops gunman Jess Buckhorn from shooting Little Hawk (Leonard Nimoy) who denies stealing horses from a mission. Attorney Fred Griffin, the gunman's secret employer, is plotting to discredit the Indians so he can gain title to their land.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Writer Jay Pell sets out to create a new legendary bad man for his readers. He persuades an outlaw to hold up a stagecoach so that he can write an 'eyewitness' account. When things go wrong, Sheriff Clay Hollister is tricked into another scheme.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: With his fiancée arriving from London, Ron Browning will do anything to keep her from finding out what a failure he is…even die…at least on paper. But his courage in a later crisis may restore his self-respect and save the Sheriff at the same time.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Paul Hayden is baited into a fight with three wild brothers, wounding one. When he later meets and falls in love with Karen Thomas, the sister of his three assailants, Hollister attempts to untangle the snarled affairs and prevent murder.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In self-defense, Sheriff Hollister gunned down the son of the richest rancher in the territory, who offers a reward for Clay's death. A Marshal of a neighboring town lures the sheriff out of town so he, himself, can kill Clay and claim the reward.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher is killed and robbed of the ranch payroll. With only a horseshoe print to go by, Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne set about trapping the culprit and end up meeting him in a furious fight. Alan Hale, Jr. guest stars.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sentenced to hang for a holdup murder, Reed Barker meets his fate at the gallows... but when the rope breaks when the trap is sprung, he is freed under Territorial Law. Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne must unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Angered over several recent mine disasters, Sheriff Hollister wages a campaign for mine safety legislation with the aid of Editor Claibourne of the Tombstone Epitaph. In the process, they uncover a clever ruse to discredit the safety campaign.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Sir Edward Marion unexpectedly downs a famous 'fast gun,' he attains a certain dangerous notoriety. This brings him to the notice of Bat Masterson with whom he exchanges some unusual demonstrations of fancy gunmanship.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gambling Hall Owner Bat Masterson is mystified when business booms but profits plummet. Investigating, he finds his partner's fingers in the cash drawer - and slams it shut.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: In the expulsion match against the Paradox Brothers, Syrus must overcome his issues with his older brother Zane in order win the match.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Dr. Crowler taps dueling whiz kid Bastion Misawa to be his new protégé, but first must beat Obelisk Blue's Chazz Princeton to prove his worth.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: When Chazz suddenly goes missing, Jaden and the crew go looking for him, but instead of finding Chazz, they find a dueling monkey who takes one of Alexis's friends hostage!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: After some students accidentally summon a Duel Monster for real, it's up to Jaden to duel him and win their souls back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden finds himself in an outrageously competitive duel against a sports nut who's bent winning Alexis's heart and making Jaden look bad.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: After a menacing Duel Giant is seen around campus, Dr. Crowler convinces Jaden to track him down, but when Jaden catches up with the titan, he must beat him in a duel or become his next victim!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: When someone is stealing from the Card Shack, Jaden and the crew go on a stakeout to catch the culprit, but when the thief turns out to be a former student who's been living in the jungle, a truly wild duel ensues.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: A copycat duelist steals Yugi Muto's deck and mannerisms, and Jaden must duel him to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden continues his duel against the copycat duelist, trying his best to defeat the legendary and powerful deck that was used by the King of Games.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: When a love-struck girl sneaks into the boys' dorm, Jaden challenges her to a duel to find out exactly why she's there and what she wants.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: To decide who will be Duel Academy's representative at the high stakes School Duel with North Academy, Jaden and Bastion must battle it out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden and Bastion continue their duel to see who will win the honor of representing Duel Academy at the School Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Not being able to stomach the thought of Jaden representing Duel Academy at the School Duel, Doctor Crowler arranges a duel where if Jaden loses, he'll end up in a lazy daze forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Freedom is on the line as Jaden and Chazz continue to duel it out for school and personal pride.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden continues his duel against the Shadow Rider known as Nightshroud, who has extra mysteries of his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden steps up to confront Camula with the souls of Dr. Crowler and Zane at stake.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden and the gang get sucked into a strange vortex where a duelist who bears a striking resemblance to Kaiba forces Jaden to face his worst fears or be overcome by them!
